LanguageData.RimIOT_PC_StatusNoProducer: Production connector: no production building above
LanguageData.RimIOT_PC_StatusMultiple: Warning: multiple production connectors under this building
LanguageData.RimIOT_PC_EnableRecipeDropIntercept: Send recipe-side dropped items to the IOT network
LanguageData.RimIOT_PC_EnableRecipeDropInterceptDesc: When enabled, items that are dropped while a production building processes recipe ingredients are intercepted and submitted to that building's connected IOT network. Requires restart.
LanguageData.RimIOT_PC_RestartRequired: Changes to this setting take effect after restarting RimWorld.
